name: IRC_LI_RSC_SYNC_HISTORY
description: Stores the history of calls that were made as part of LinkedIn RSC integration

columns.Name: SYNC_HISTORY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the ORC Entity. Can be PERSON_ID, REQUISITION_ID, SUBMISSION_ID.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of ORC entity. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_ENTITY_TYPE

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Action to be excuted by the sync. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_ACTION

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: The status of this sync action. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_LI_RSC_SYNC_STATUS

columns.Name: SYNC_ERROR
columns.Comments: The error, if any, of the sync action.

columns.Name: BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_LI_RSC_BATCH_HISTORY

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO
columns.Comments: Additional info for the record being synced

columns.Name: QUEUE_ID
columns.Comments: Queue id. This is from a queue table column

columns.Name: PROCESSOR_ID
columns.Comments: Processor id of queue table column

columns.Name: ASSOCIATED_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Assocated entity id from queue table column

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Retry count from queue table column

columns.Name: PROCESS_AFTER_DATE
columns.Comments: Process after date from queue table column

columns.Name: Q_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Creation date from queue table column

columns.Name: Q_CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Created by from queue table column

columns.Name: Q_LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Last updated by from queue table column

columns.Name: Q_LAST_UPDATED_DATE
columns.Comments: Last updated date from queue table column

columns.Name: Q_LAST_UPDATED_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Last updated login from queue table column

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PAYLOAD
columns.Comments: The OAC(Onsite Apply Configuration) data for requisition
